answer:
LiveAgent provides two API versions, v1 and v3, which require separate, version-specific API keys managed in your account dashboard [1][2]. 

To authenticate, include your valid API key as a parameter in your request [3][4]. For v3, generate your key under Configuration, System, API, and assign necessary scopes to the key [1][5]. For the deprecated v1, generate the key within the Settings for API v1 section on the same configuration page [1]. Ensure the key version matches the endpoint being called to avoid 403 errors [1]. You can access interactive documentation at https://YOURDOMAIN.ladesk.com/docs/api/v3/#/ [5].

results.title: LiveAgent API v1 vs v3: Authentication Differences, API Key Management, and Resolving 403 Errors
